commands.review_summary:
The PR adds OAuth refresh-token reuse, sign-in-again, invalid-refresh-token, and expired-or-revoked refresh-token messages to the permanent-auth failover matcher with focused unit coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main lacks these strings in the auth_permanent matcher, and the failover path uses that matcher to choose auth_permanent. No live provider run was performed in this read-only review.
